title: Rep. Jeffries says Trump like an old boyfriend
shortDescription: Rep. Hakeem Jeffries, during his DNC convention address, said America 'broke up' with Donald Trump and never "ever getting back together."

title: Watch Bill Clinton endorse Harris at 2024 DNC
shortDescription: Former President Bill Clinton passed the Democrats' torch to presidential nominee Kamala Harris at the 2024 DNC. Watch the full speech

title: Hakeem Jeffries calls Donald Trump an ex-boyfriend in DNC speech
shortDescription: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries takes the stage on the third night of the DNC

title: Congresista de Texas a Trump sobre la frontera 'no sabes nada'
shortDescription: La congresista de Texas Veronica Escobar hablo sobre su experiencia creciendo en la frontera entre El Paso y Ciudad Juárez.

title: DNC speeches: Olivia Julianna encourages Gen Z to vote
shortDescription: Olivia Julianna spoke from the Democratic National Convention floor Wednesday. She called on Gen Z to vote. Watch the video of her speech.

title: Protesters threatened to overtake DNC. Hostage families welcomed by Democrats
shortDescription: Families of American hostages held by Hamas in Gaza bring their message to anyone who will listen at Democratic National Convention.

title: Watch: Rep. Bennie Thompson speaks about Trumps role on January 6
shortDescription: Bennie Thompson, who led Committee to Investigate the January 6 riot, laid the blame for the violence that day at the feet of Donald Trump.

title: Watch Former Trump administration advisor Olivia Troye's DNC speech
shortDescription: Former White House Homeland Security Olivia Troye under the Trump-Pence Administration delivered a speech at the Democratic National Convention.

title: Watch Republican ex-Georgia Lt. Gov. reject Trump at DNC speech
shortDescription: Former Republican Lt. Gov Geoff Duncan became the latest GOP defector to take the stage at the DNC convention to denounce Donald Trump. Watch it here

title: Activist Jessica Mackler decries GOP abortion bans in DNC speech
shortDescription: Jessica Mackler's DNC speech targets GOP abortion restrictions, highlighting Project 2025 and rallying Democrats for the 2024 election fight.

title: Josh Shapiro fights back against Trump's antisemitism talking point
shortDescription: Donald Trump says Kamala Harris didn't choose Josh Shapiro as her running mate 'because he's Jewish.' Shapiro condemns Trump's comments.
